rationale: For Portugal, the main indirect concern remains energy price uncertainty tied to the unresolved Iran deal; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily Portuguese life.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over an Iran deal keeps global oil and gas prices volatile, indirectly affecting Portugal's energy costs and cost of living.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon adds risk to Middle East stability and could affect Atlantic shipping routes and energy markets, with minor indirect impact on Portugal.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: new rules and rival marches in Rome
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy discussions have some relevance for Portugal as a destination country, but no new binding rules enacted this cycle.
